response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a concert performance by Takanashi Kiara. 2. Mapped out the scenes based on visual content: Intro talk (00:00-00:05), 'Sparks' performance (00:05-04:03), and concluding talk (04:03-05:01). 3. Identified the song title as 'Sparks' from context and performer Takanashi Kiara. 4. Searched for 'Takanashi Kiara Sparks lyrics' using the search tool and successfully retrieved the full lyrics. 5. Formatted lyrics and metadata into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A live concert performance of the song 'Sparks' by VTuber Takanashi Kiara, preceded and followed by brief talking segments.

scenes.description: Performance of the song 'Sparks' by Takanashi Kiara.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Lying down on the floor
Late night and you don't know, don't know
Don't know what to do
Hard to tell what's wrong, what's right
If yes or no, don't know
Don't know what to do
The storm hits hard and you're losing the way
Just take a chance and dance in the rain
'Cause you got the key, never throw it away
Don't forget, don't forget what I said

Get out of your head
Life is only what you make it
You're gonna be okay (kay, kay, kay)
So go ahead and do it, do it
If you want it, let's get to it
Everybody's gonna know your name

'Cause sparks light the flame
Turn the dark of the night into day
(Don't stop, don't stop, just go your own way)
So don't be afraid
Trust your heart, keep your head in the game
(Keep up, keep up, and never be afraid)
Gotta make it hot like a volcano
Strike a match and burn it up
Kick your feet against the table
To the beat of your own drum
Sparks light the flame, so don't wait
Start a fire today
(Don't stop, don't stop, just go your own way)

We ain't looking back, take the fast lane now
In the driver's seat strapped, they just gasp out loud
Going so fast that it shouldn't be allowed
That's how we like it, you heard what I said

Get out of your head
Life is only what you make it
You're gonna be okay (yeah, yeah)
So take a step and move it, move it
'Less you try, you won't get through it
Everybody's gonna know your name!

'Cause sparks light the flame
Turn the dark of the night into day
(Don't stop, don't stop, just go your own way)
So don't be afraid
Trust your heart, keep your head in the game
(Keep up, keep up, and never be afraid)

Let go of the past tonight
Choose the future only you define
Even when the flames burn too bright, you're alive
From the ashes you rise

'Cause sparks light the flame
Turn the dark of the night into day
(Don't stop, don't stop, just go your own way)
So don't be afraid
Trust your heart, keep your head in the game
(Keep up, keep up, and never be afraid)
Gotta make it hot like a volcano
Strike a match and burn it up (ooh-oh-oh)
Kick your feet against the table
To the beat of your own drum (ooh-ooh)
Sparks light the flame, so don't wait
Start a fire today
(Don't stop, don't stop, just go your own way)
Ah yeah
